original_statement: how many competitors had more than 100 points?
mutated_statement: how many participants had more than a certain score yet at most that score?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Terminology substitution + Quantity vagueness + Logical contradiction: "competitors" → "participants" (entity generalized) | "points" → "score" (term swap) | "100 points" → "a certain score" (specific number → vague variable) | "more than 100 points" → "more than a certain score yet at most that score" (introduces mutually contradictory conditions)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中明确陈述“the condition 'more than a certain score yet at most that score' is self-contradictory; no participant can...，因此计数为零”，可识别出代理已识别出矛盾。日志显示在simple_query前的thought也给出相同逻辑解释，并通过返回0作为查询结果实现回应。代理没有请求澄清或修改指令，也未尝试通过折衷执行互斥条件，而是直接用逻辑论证说明该条件在语义上不成立并据此回答，因此属于通过逻辑推理合理化矛盾的情形（1b）。
